# TERREYA HOLDING

> Terreya Holding - создание ИИ-архитектуры, автоматизация бизнес-процессов, макро-системы и премиальная разработка.

## About Us
Terreya Holding is an AI architecture and digital systems agency based in Uzbekistan. We build autonomous AI swarms, headless CRMs, B2B dashboards, and liminal/brutalist web interfaces.

## Our Divisions
- **Terreya**: Core architecture, programming, multi-agent systems, and business automation.
- **AVRALAB**: Visual storytelling, brutalist UI/UX design, marketing packaging.
- **Sound Studio**: Sound design, AI voice synthesis, cinematic production.

## Case Studies / Portfolio
- **AVRALAB.UZ**: Brutalist design studio showcase. Built with Next.js, Framer Motion.
- **ADAM AUDIO CATALOG**: Premium studio monitors catalog with GSAP animations.
- **CRM-APP & DASHBOARD**: Headless CLI + Web Dashboard for finance tracking. (Vite/React, PostgreSQL).
- **SMARTSOLIQ AGENT**: Tax compliance AI agent for self-employed (Node.js, E-IMZO).
- **AI ORCHESTRATOR V3**: Local daemon for coordinating agent swarms (Claude, Codex, Antigravity) via WebSocket.
- **AUTONOMOUS SHORTS FACTORY**: Fully-automated YouTube content pipeline (FastAPI, FFmpeg, Whisper).
- **FACTORY HERMES**: Distributed message broker and Telegram gateway with adversarial AI review.
- **DVOR APP BACKEND**: iOS backend with local caching (AES-GCM) and SSL Pinning.

## Contact
- **Website**: https://terreya.com
- **Services**: AI Orchestration, Web Development, Branding, Sound Design.
